approved_facts.summary: User acquisition peaks from late August through September as league seasons start.
approved_facts.source: Founder confirmation after first launch cycle

preferences.summary: Prefer organic and partnership growth over aggressive paid acquisition until retention improves.

rejected_strategies.summary: Generic player-news recap content was rejected because it did not differentiate the product.

successful_patterns.summary: Weekly start-sit decision content produced the strongest engagement and referral sharing.

open_questions.summary: Best trigger for premium upgrade conversion is still unclear.
